meta.correction_note: REVISED after real HYPE price data obtained. Valid_outcome_measurement upgraded from unknown to pass. Benchmark_validity remains unknown (BTC is weak proxy for HYPE). Verdict remains insufficient_evidence.
meta.btc_benchmark_note: BTC is a weak proxy benchmark for HYPE. HYPE raw 1h change: +1.13%. BTC 1h change: -0.06%. HYPE relative to BTC: +1.19%. The relative reaction is positive but attribution to Loracle position specifically cannot be confirmed.

attribution_assessment.notes: Development Set sample w1_001. Real HYPE price data obtained (9 candles from Hyperliquid). HYPE 1h raw return: +1.13%. BTC benchmark return: -0.06%. Relative return: +1.19%. However: (1) usable_t0 is unknown — action time vs broadcast time delta is unknown, (2) pre_outcome_registration was retrospective, (3) BTC is a weak proxy for HYPE, (4) interference/inventory is insufficient. Verdict remains insufficient_evidence — the price reaction is documented but cannot be attributed to the event.
attribution_assessment.btc_benchmark_weak_proxy_note: BTC is a weak proxy for HYPE. HYPE 1h return of +1.13% vs BTC 1h return of -0.06% shows divergence, but without HYPE-specific benchmark or longer volatility history, relative materiality cannot be assessed.
